summary: Clear audience-sourced recording of a solid post‑71 show with a standout performance of "Loser".
review: Both reviewers praise the upgraded audience capture, noting that it sounds good and provides an enjoyable listening experience. The concert is described as a solid show and even one of the best road performances after 1971, highlighted by a particularly nice rendition of "Loser."

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews emphasize strong musical performance and an improved audience recording, yielding a rating above average but not exceptional.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Upgraded audience source provides clearer sound than typical crowd recordings; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers mention the show as solid overall with no specific criticisms about pacing or transitions.
